message:
feat(h2): enhance PUSH_PROMISE handling and connection state machine

Improve HTTP/2 connection handling with better PUSH_PROMISE support
and more robust connection state management.

Changes:
- Add PUSH_PROMISE frame validation per RFC 9113
- Improve server push stream tracking and limit enforcement
- Better connection preface handling
- Enhanced error recovery for stream errors vs connection errors
- Add metrics for push promise accept/reject rates

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
